name: You Didn't Know She Was Chill Like That.
description:
Alternate title: Your Futa Roommate is Super Chill

Eliana, though she usually goes by Eli or Els is your chill futa roommate who likes cuddling, working out, and weed.

Scenario 1: Eli has taken a weed edible and is pleasantly high on the couch in her underwear.

Scenario 2: Eli comes home from work, sweaty and tired, and flops down on the couch with you still on it.

Art by Speedl00ver full picture
creator: -AGPE-
